lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic imperfections, and the interior has light wear from normal use. It is mechanically sound and performs reliably.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolutely stunning vehicle that looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It has been meticulously cared for and is in pristine, flawless condition inside and out. This is a rare opportunity to own a car that is truly in perfect shape and ready for its next owner to enjoy!

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, representing a rare find for a discerning buyer. The exterior paint is flawless, with no chips, scratches, or dents, and it retains its original showroom shine. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the upholstery shows absolutely no wear, and all electronic features, including the infotainment and climate controls, function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and always stored in a climate-controlled garage. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership, offering a smooth, powerful, and quiet experience. This is an exceptional, showroom-quality example of the model, suited for someone looking for a vehicle in a near-perfect state.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work to be roadworthy. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, significant paint oxidation, and visible rust on the rocker panels. Inside, the cabin has seen better days; the upholstery is torn in multiple places, and there is a persistent musty odor. Mechanically, the engine is struggling with a rough idle and a persistent oil leak, while the transmission exhibits slipping during gear changes. Several dashboard warning lights are active, and the tires are near the end of their life. This vehicle is sold strictly as-is, making it an ideal candidate for a parts car or a dedicated restoration project for an experienced mechanic.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function as new. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or rust. The interior shows no signs of wear and remains in original condition.

We are pleased to present an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its initial delivery. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one and is looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. You won't find another one this clean and well-cared for!

Presenting a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in concours-level condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, delivering linear power to a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The mechanical integrity is absolute, with documented rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul already performed. The chassis is reinforced to prevent subframe fatigue, and the suspension maintains factory-spec kinematics with fresh bushings and OEM Sachs dampers. Power is
Mint condition. Original paint. Flawless interior. Single owner. Full service history. Garage kept. No accidents. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'mint condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained and curated by a single owner, kept exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior paint retains a deep, factory-fresh luster, free from any swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is in peak performance, supported by a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule at authorized service centers. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched alloy wheels, every detail has been preserved to the highest standard. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer seeking a showroom-quality driving experience without the new-car price tag. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a custom car cover.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits a showroom-grade exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that meets the highest benchmarks of the marque. For the discerning enthusiast seeking a specimen of peerless aesthetic and mechanical integrity, this vehicle represents an uncompromising investment in quality.

We are pleased to present this superlative motorcar, preserved in impeccable condition that rivals its original showroom debut. Meticulously maintained and engineered to the highest standards, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands peerless quality and uncompromising performance. Every detail reflects a legacy of rigorous care and sophisticated maintenance, ensuring an automotive experience of the highest caliber.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this ride is. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept in a climate-controlled garage and pampered since day one. It looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere! If you're looking for perfection, this is the one. Come see it and fall in love!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3 in impeccable condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS for a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically optimized with a documented rod bearing service and a reinforced rear subframe to address chassis fatigue. The ZF 6-speed manual transmission provides precise shift throws, while the variable M differential lock ensures maximum lateral traction. This vehicle retains its factory-correct finish and remains free of any mechanical or cosmetic blemishes. A turn-key powerhouse for the serious enthusiast.
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, boasting a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior is indistinguishable from new, featuring pristine leather, untouched trim, and that signature factory-fresh scent. Mechanically, it is absolute perfection, supported by a comprehensive service history and exceptionally low mileage. Every button, switch, and system functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly immaculate example of engineering excellence. Non-smoker, no accidents, and ready for its next home.

We are proud to present this extraordinary vehicle, maintained in impeccable, showroom-ready condition. Every detail of this automobile, from its flawless exterior finish to the pristine, meticulously preserved interior, reflects a standard of care that is truly unparalleled. This is an investment-grade specimen intended for the most discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection in both performance and aesthetics.

We are pleased to present this collector-grade vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This specimen exhibits no compromise in aesthetic preservation or mechanical integrity, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine example of the marque. Every detail, from the flawless coachwork to the refined interior, underscores a legacy of meticulous stewardship and uncompromising quality.

Hey there! 🚗 I’m looking for a new home for my absolute pride and joy! This beauty is in truly pristine, mint condition—honestly, it still feels and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it from day one, keeping it spotless and perfectly maintained. If you want a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership stress, you’ve found it! Feel free to message me with any questions, I'd love to chat!

Offered is a concours-level E92 M3, featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 with its signature 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. This specimen is in pristine condition, showing zero signs of mechanical fatigue or thermal stress. The 6-speed manual transmission provides precise, short-throw engagement, paired with a factory-maintained Variable M Differential Lock for optimal power delivery and lateral

This car is in truly mint condition—sparkling clean, meticulously cared for, and it still drives like it just left the showroom! It’s been my favorite ride ever, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. You won't find a single flaw on this beauty!

Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Original paint. Clean title. Service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior paint retains its original deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. The body lines are laser-straight, and the alloy wheels are pristine, showing no signs of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and completely devoid of creases or wear, while the original 'new car' scent lingers. Every technological feature, from the high-fidelity surround sound system to the intuitive navigation display, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by certified specialists. The engine delivers smooth, effortless power, and the transmission shifts are imperceptible, providing a driving experience that is indistinguishable from the day it left the assembly line. This is a rare, collector-grade opportunity for a buyer who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable aesthetic preservation and flawless mechanical integrity. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands a vehicle of peerless quality and uncompromising provenance.
